surfaces.label: Controlled source context
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
Controlled evidence reference: SYN-RR-PLACEHOLDER-01
Controlled synthetic technical control — independent expected-truth source (test-harness design, not the probe's own rendered output).
Probe design: Controlled unresolved template placeholder at copy exit
Controlled input construction: Test harness supplies a string containing an unresolved merge-field placeholder token, independent of any real client bundle.
Expected behaviour under test: Placeholder text must fail closed: canCopy=false. A placeholder reaching solicitor copy would be a false negative.

surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:

Reason: Unresolved placeholder text must not be copied.
